title: schizonotus dumosus
intro: Schizonotus dumosus, also known as the 'clustered broom fern', is a species of fern in the family Osmundaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits associated with Schizonotus dumosus include reduced inflammation and improved immune function, making it a potential treatment for various conditions such as arthritis and respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, Schizonotus dumosus is often used in infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, and can also be dried and used as a tea or added to bath water for its therapeutic benefits.
